name: RunwayML Aleph 2
description: RunwayML's video editing model. Edit one frame to update your whole video, make changes across multiple shots, and work with up to 30 seconds of video. Supports keyframe-guided editing for precise control over specific moments in the clip.

examples.name: Simple Video Edit
examples.description: Apply a text-only edit to an existing video

input.prompt: Transform the scene into a golden-hour sunset with warm lighting

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Keyframe-Guided Edit
examples.description: Edit a video using a reference image anchored to the first frame of the output

input.prompt: Edit the video to match the provided reference frame

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Timed Keyframe Edit
examples.description: Place a guidance image at a specific timestamp within the input video using keyframes[].seconds

input.prompt: Change the background to a futuristic cityscape at night

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Content Moderation Override
examples.description: Edit a video featuring public figures with relaxed content moderation

input.prompt: Make the background a dramatic stormy sky

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the edit to apply to the input video

video_uri.description: HTTPS URL, Runway URI, or data URI of the source video to edit (≤30 seconds)

keyframes.description: Timed guidance images placed at specific points in the input video. Each entry has a uri and either seconds (absolute timestamp) or at (fractional position). Up to 5.

uri.description: HTTPS URL, Runway URI, or data URI of the guidance image

seconds.description: Absolute timestamp in seconds from the start of the input video

uri.description: HTTPS URL, Runway URI, or data URI of the guidance image

at.description: Position as a fraction [0.0, 1.0] of the input video duration

prompt_images.description: Image keyframes for guiding the edit at specific points in the output video. Up to 5.

uri.description: HTTPS URL, Runway URI, or data URI of the keyframe image

position.description: Where in the output video this image applies: "first", "last", { type: "timestamp", timestampSeconds }, or { type: "position", positionPercentage }

timestampSeconds.description: Absolute timestamp in seconds from the start of the output video

positionPercentage.description: Position as a fraction [0.0, 1.0] of the total video duration

content_moderation.description: Settings that affect the behavior of the content moderation system

public_figure_threshold.description: When set to "low", content moderation is less strict about recognizable public figures

duration.description: Duration of the source video in seconds. Used for billing only — not sent to RunwayML. Provide this so the gateway can compute per-second video cost accurately.
